title: Angle Ring
description: I think I spelt that right?
body:
# Angle Ring
I think I spelt that right?

Simple creative flight ring mod for Fabric and NeoForge.

## Licensing
Angle Ring is dual-licensed under [Polyform Strict](https://tangled.sh/@lesbian.skin/angle_ring/blob/main/LICENSE) and conditionally under the [EUPL v1.2](https://tangled.sh/@lesbian.skin/angle_ring/blob/main/LICENSE-EUPL).

If you wish to gain a copy of Angle Ring under the EUPL, please reach out at [mia@naomieow.xyz](mailto:mia@naomieow.xyz), on my [Discord](https://chat.lesbian.skin/) or on the [issue tracker](https://tangled.sh/@lesbian.skin/angle_ring/issues).
